sourceMovie.title: Space Cowboys
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Space Cowboys works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Armageddon
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Space Cowboys clicked for you, Armageddon (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Space Cowboys clicked for you, Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan (1982) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Space Cowboys?
faq.answer: Try Armageddon, Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan, Star Trek: Generations—each shares DNA with Space Cowboys while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Space Cowboys?
faq.answer: Space Cowboys (2000) is best described as Action, Adventure, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Space Cowboys worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
